title: Preserve a Visible Predictable Focus Route
summary: Build and verify keyboard focus in keyboard-only survey completion route through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain keyboard focus from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply keyboard focus without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 03 · Read the keyboard-only survey completion route case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 3: Which claim preserves keyboard focus when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: keyboard-only survey completion route.
steps.why: Preserve a Visible Predictable Focus Route makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 3 in keyboard-only survey completion route.

content.text: Keyboard access requires native activation, logical DOM order, visible focus, safe skip navigation, and focus movement only when the task needs it. Positive tabindex values create brittle alternate order. Tab reaches interactive elements, arrow keys operate radio groups and other composite controls, Enter activates links, and Space activates buttons and checkboxes according to native conventions. Apply it to keyboard-only survey completion route.
